name: Qwen-VL
license: Tongyi Qianwen LICENSE AGREEMENT (custom, free for research and commercial use)
archDisplay: OpenCLIP ViT-bigG vision encoder + Qwen-7B decoder, single-layer cross-attention position-aware adapter
note: First Qwen VLM (ViT-bigG + Qwen-7B, 9.6B total); accepts image/text/bounding-box input and can output bounding boxes for grounding.

results.notes: GQA visual-reasoning benchmark (unrelated to Grouped Query Attention)
Zero-shot captioning CIDEr, reported SOTA among generalist VLMs at release
AI2D diagram QA, base Qwen-VL row (distinct from Qwen-VL-Chat) in the HF model card's text-oriented VQA table

verificationNotes: Confirmed real (arXiv 2308.12966, pub. 2023-08-24; GitHub QwenLM/Qwen-VL). 9.6B total params, 8,192 context, Tongyi Qianwen license (free research+commercial) all confirmed on HF/GitHub README. Re-fetched GitHub README benchmark tables: vqav2 78.8, ok-vqa 58.6, gqa-vqa 59.3, textvqa 63.8, docvqa 65.1, chartqa 65.7, refcoco 89.36, refcoco-plus 83.12, flickr30k 85.8 all literally match the 'Qwen-VL' (base model) row. DROPPED touchstone-en (645.2) and touchstone-zh (401.2): the README table shows these scores belong to the 'Qwen-VL-Chat' row, not the base 'Qwen-VL' pretrained model this record describes — no TouchStone score exists for base Qwen-VL, so the original attribution was wrong-model, not just wrong-number.
